description:
Perform a normality test on the residuals of a regression model using the 'food.gdt' dataset.

1. Run an OLS regression of 'food_exp' (dependent) on 'income' (independent).
2. Save the residuals from this regression to the dataset.
3. Perform a normality test (e.g., Doornik-Hansen) on these residuals.
4. Save the text output of the normality test to '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/normality_test.txt'.
5. Create a frequency distribution plot of the residuals with a Normal density curve overlay.
6. Save the plot as a PNG image to '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/residual_hist.png'.
